circularPalette.label: Circular Palette
circularPalette.description: Makes the palette wrap around by blending the last color back into the first, creating a seamless continuous color loop instead of stopping at the last color.

cycles.label: Count
cycles.description: Number of times the full palette color sequence cycles during the effect. Higher values make the color transitions happen faster.

hFade.label: Horizontal Fade
hFade.description: Fades the wash color from full brightness at the horizontal center to black at the left and right edges.

reverseFades.label: Reverse Fades
reverseFades.description: Reverses the direction of the vertical and horizontal fades so brightness is at the edges and fades to black at the center.

shimmer.label: Shimmer
shimmer.description: Alternates between the current wash color and black on every other frame, creating a rapid strobe-like flicker.

vFade.label: Vertical Fade
vFade.description: Fades the wash color from full brightness at the vertical center to black at the top and bottom edges.

registryDefinition.notes: Structure often changes more from boolean fade combinations than from numeric cycle changes. Broad canonical coverage is still required because fade-direction semantics shift by geometry.

retainedParameters.rationale: Some semantic change was observed, but the evidence is narrow. This parameter may depend on geometry, render style, or other settings.
